postData.contentHtml:
The search for the next environmental advocate and beauty queen is nearing its thrilling conclusion as Miss Philippines Earth 2024, Joy Barcoma, prepares to pass on her crown. The grand coronation night for the 26th edition of the Miss Philippines Earth pageant is scheduled for June 27th in Malitbog, Bukidnon.

Barcoma, who has championed environmental causes throughout her reign, will oversee the moment one of the 33 determined aspirants is chosen as her successor. These delegates, representing various parts of the country and overseas Filipino communities, have embarked on a journey that celebrates beauty, intelligence, and dedication to environmental protection.

The event in Malitbog promises to be a memorable occasion, marking a new chapter for the Miss Philippines Earth organization and ushering in a fresh face to lead its advocacy. While a recent report also highlighted Barcoma's defense of a hosting job amid some criticism, overall social sentiment regarding her reign and the upcoming pageant appears to be largely positive, reflecting the public's excitement and anticipation for the coronation.
postData.title: Countdown to Coronation: Joy Barcoma to Crown Miss Philippines Earth Successor in Malitbog
postData.summary: Reigning Miss Philippines Earth, Joy Barcoma, is set to conclude her impactful reign by crowning her successor in the scenic province of Bukidnon. The highly anticipated 26th edition of the national beauty pageant culminates on June 27th in Malitbog, where 33 hopefuls will vie for the prestigious title.

sources.title: Joy Barcoma to crown Miss Philippines Earth successor in Malitbog
Joy Barcoma defends hosting job amid criticism
33 aspirants eye Joy Barcoma's Miss Philippines Earth crown
